title: Ghost vs Benchmark Email (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Ghost vs Benchmark Email: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Ghost vs Benchmark Email: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Ghost and Benchmark Email comes down to your specific use case. Ghost is built for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Benchmark Email targets small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses
comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting An Easy-To-Use Email Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform

faq.q: Is Ghost better than Benchmark Email?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Ghost wins for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses, while Benchmark Email is stronger for small businesses wanting an easy-to-use email platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Ghost or Benchmark Email?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Benchmark Email to Ghost?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
